description: Outcome-based persistent memory for AI coding tools (Claude Code, OpenCode)
release_notes: v0.5.7: Hardening release. Startup garbage collection for the MCP hook's _completion_state.json — the file accumulated one entry per conversation_id ever seen with no cleanup, driving I/O amplification on every write and leaving stuck scored_this_turn=True flags that could poison the cross-session scoring fallback. New SessionManager._cleanup_completion_state pass drops entries older than 30 days or with no matching transcript, enforces a 500-entry hard ceiling, and writes atomically. JSONL transcript TTL bumped 7 -> 30 days to stay in lockstep with the state-file TTL. ARCHITECTURE.md cleanup of accumulated drift across v0.3.5 -> v0.5.6 (dead KG section, BM25 search pipeline, score_memories API shape, init paths, endpoint tables, dev deps) with benchmark numbers now cited inline to roampal-labs/paper.md. Ships paired with Roampal Desktop v0.3.3 which automates the manual workaround at GUI bulk-clear time. 720 tests pass (roampal/ full suite).
